policyStatement: Lifecycle evidence manifests record release-runner evidence only; this template does not claim public beta readiness and does not claim native lifecycle execution in CI.

release.ciRunUrl: <required: CI run URL, release-runner run URL, command output, or build record>

includedPlatforms.platform: <required: linux, macos, windows, android, or ios>

packageManagerManualRunnerBoundary.evidence: <required: command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL showing native install/upgrade/uninstall/rollback stayed manual>

serverLifecycleEvidence.artifactOrPackageIdentifier: <required: exact server binary/package identifier, file name, version, or package id>
serverLifecycleEvidence.servicePlanEvidence: <required: service-plan command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
serverLifecycleEvidence.installArtifactEvidence: <required: install-service artifact path plus command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
serverLifecycleEvidence.uninstallArtifactEvidence: <required: uninstall-service artifact path plus command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
serverLifecycleEvidence.startEvidence: <required: release-runner service start command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
serverLifecycleEvidence.stopEvidence: <required: release-runner service stop command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
serverLifecycleEvidence.healthEvidence: <required: release-runner health/status command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
serverLifecycleEvidence.rollbackEvidence: <required: release-runner rollback command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>

clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.platform: <required: linux, macos, windows, android, or ios>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.artifactOrPackageIdentifier: <required: exact package/artifact identifier, file name, version, or package id>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.installEvidence: <required: release-runner package-manager command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.launchEvidence: <required: release-runner launch command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.profileEvidence: <required: release-runner connection profile evidence, command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.upgradeEvidence: <required: release-runner package-manager upgrade command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.dataRetentionEvidence: <required: release-runner retained profile/data evidence, command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.uninstallEvidence: <required: release-runner package-manager uninstall command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>
clientPackageLifecycleEvidence.rollbackEvidence: <required: release-runner rollback command output, build record, release-runner record, or URL>

finalLifecycleEvidenceDecision.rationale: <required: lifecycle evidence decision rationale; blocked when any lifecycle result is failed, blocked, or not-run>
